    have hA' : dist N A = Γ.radius := by rw [← Γ_center_eq_N]; exact (Metric.mem_sphere.1 A_mem_inter.2)
    have hB' : dist N B = Γ.radius := by rw [← Γ_center_eq_N]; exact (Metric.mem_sphere.1 B_mem_inter.2)
    refine (EuclideanGeometry.reflection_eq_of_dist_eq M_ne_N ?_ ?_).symm
    · rw [dist_comm, hA, dist_comm, hB]
    · rw [dist_comm, hA', dist_comm, hB']
  have hB_not_AP : B ∉ line[ℝ, A, P] := by
    intro h
    have h_L : line[ℝ, A, B].direction ⟂ L.direction := separation_perpendicular_reflection A_ne_B.symm
    have h_AP : line[ℝ, A, B] = line[ℝ, A, P] := by
      refine (AffineSubspace.eq_line_of_mem A_ne_B ?_ h).symm
      simp [AffineSubspace.mem_affineSpan]
    have hP : P ∈ L := by
      rw [P_eq_circumcenter]
      apply Triangle.circumcenter_mem_affineSpan_of_points_mem
      · intro i; fin_cases i
        · rw [h_AP] at h; exact (affineSpan_pair_subset ℝ A B) h
        · exact C_mem_inter.1
        · exact D_mem_inter.1
    exact affineIndependent_PMN.not_collinear (collinear_of_mem_affineSpan hP (left_mem_affineSpan ℝ P N) (right_mem_affineSpan ℝ P N))
  have h_ind : AffineIndependent ℝ ![B, E, F] := by
    have hE : E ∈ line[ℝ, A, P] := E_mem_inter.1
    have hF : F ∈ line[ℝ, A, P] := F_mem_inter.1
    have hEF : E ≠ F := by
      intro h; subst h; rw [← Ω_center_eq_M, ← Γ_center_eq_N] at E_mem_inter F_mem_inter
      have h_rad : Ω.radius = Γ.radius := by
        rw [← dist_comm M E, Metric.mem_sphere.1 E_mem_inter.2, ← dist_comm N E, Metric.mem_sphere.1 F_mem_inter.2]
        sorry
      exact Ω_radius_lt_Γ_radius.ne h_rad
    refine affineIndependent_of_ne_of_not_collinear (hEF) ?_
    intro h; exact hB_not_AP (line_subset_line_of_mem hE hF h)
  use h_ind
  rw [Metric.Sphere.isTangent_iff_dist_eq_radius]
  sorry

sorry
  exact h_dist

let L := line[ℝ, A, P]
  have hE : E ∈ L := E_mem_inter.1
  have hF : F ∈ L := F_mem_inter.1
  have hA : A ∈ L := left_mem_affineSpan ℝ A P
  have hAEF : Collinear ℝ {A, E, F} := by
    rw [← line_eq_affineSpan A P]
    exact ⟨hA, hE, hF⟩
  have hB_ref : B = reflection (affineSpan ℝ {M, N}) A := by
    have h_perp : (B -ᵥ A) ⊥ (N -ᵥ M) := by
      rw [Ω_center_eq_M, Γ_center_eq_N] at A_mem_inter B_mem_inter
      exact inner_vsub_vsub_of_dist_eq_dist_dist_eq_dist A_mem_inter.1 B_mem_inter.1 A_mem_inter.2 B_mem_inter.2
    have h_mid : (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A +ᵥ B) ∈ line[ℝ, M, N] := by
      rw [Ω_center_eq_M, Γ_center_eq_N] at A_mem_inter B_mem_inter
      apply mem_line_of_dist_eq_dist
      · exact M_ne_N
      · rw [dist_left_midpoint_eq_dist_right_midpoint, dist_comm M A, dist_comm M B]
        exact (A_mem_inter.1.trans B_mem_inter.1.symm)
      · rw [dist_left_midpoint_eq_dist_right_midpoint, dist_comm N A, dist_comm N B]
        exact (A_mem_inter.2.trans B_mem_inter.2.symm)
    exact eq_reflection_of_vsub_perp_of_midpoint_mem h_perp h_mid
  have h_not_coll : ¬ Collinear ℝ {B, E, F} := by
    intro h
    have h_A_coll : Collinear ℝ {A, E, F} := hAEF
    have h_line : line[ℝ, E, F] = L := by
      refine line_eq_of_not_orthogonal_of_collinear ?_ hAEF E_ne_A
      · intro h_perp; apply affineIndependent_ACD.not_collinear
        rw [Collinear, Set.insert_subset_iff, Set.insert_subset_iff, Set.singleton_subset_iff]
        refine ⟨hA, C_mem_inter.1, D_mem_inter.1⟩
    have h_B_mem : B ∈ L := by rwa [← h_line, h.collinear_thin E F B]
    have h_A_B_mid : (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A +ᵥ B) ∈ L := by
      apply part_of_line_vadd_vsub; repeat' (first | exact hA | exact h_B_mem)
    have h_M_N_L : line[ℝ, M, N] = L := by
      refine line_eq_of_not_orthogonal_of_collinear ?_ ?_ M_ne_N
      · rw [hB_ref] at h_B_mem; exact M_ne_N
      · exact ⟨h_mid, C_mem_inter.1, D_mem_inter.1⟩
    apply affineIndependent_ACD.not_collinear
    rw [h_M_N_L] at C_mem_inter D_mem_inter
    exact ⟨hA, C_mem_inter.1, D_mem_inter.1⟩
  let hBEF := affineIndependent_of_not_collinear h_not_coll
  use hBEF
  let K := (⟨_, hBEF⟩ : Triangle ℝ Pt).circumcenter
  let R := (⟨_, hBEF⟩ : Triangle ℝ Pt).circumradius
  let hL := AffineSubspace.mk' H L.direction
  have h_dist : dist K hL = R := by
    rw [Ω_center_eq_M, Γ_center_eq_N] at *
    have h_sim : dist A E / Ω.radius = dist A F / Γ.radius := by
      have : dist P A = dist P C ∧ dist P A = dist P D := by
        constructor <;> rw [P_eq_circumcenter] <;> exact Triangle.dist_circumcenter_eq_circumradius _ _
      let k := dist M N + Ω.radius + Γ.radius
      have h1 : dist P A * dist A E = Ω.radius * k := by sorry
      have h2 : dist P A * dist A F = Γ.radius * k := by sorry
      rw [mul_comm, ← mul_div_assoc, h1, mul_comm, ← mul_div_assoc, h2]
      field_simp; ring
    sorry
  exact circumsphere_isTangent_iff_dist_eq_radius ⟨![B, E, F], hBEF⟩ hL H (self_mem_mk' H L.direction) h_dist

rw [h_symm, reflection_dist_vec_direction_orthogonal]
      exact A_ne_B (by
        have h_in_line : B ∈ line[ℝ, A, P] := h_coll.mem_affineSpan (Or.inl rfl)
        sorry)))
  sorry

let x_P : ℝ := ((dist M N) + Γ.radius - Ω.radius) / 2
  have h_PC : dist P C = dist P A := by
    rw [P_eq_circumcenter, Triangle.dist_circumcenter_eq_dist_circumcenter _ ⟨0, by simp⟩ ⟨1, by simp⟩]
  have h_PD : dist P D = dist P A := by

  have h_B_refl : B = reflection (affineSpan ℝ {M, N}) A := by
    have h_radical : (affineSpan ℝ {A, B} : AffineSubspace ℝ Pt) = (Ω ∩ Γ).radicalAxis := sorry

  let TBEF := (⟨![B, E, F], by
